subjects.description: Vibrant green sea turtle swimming through a turquoise ocean near a coral reef.
subjects.appearance_details: Distinct patterned shell, green head and flippers, textured scales, calm eyes, smooth streamlined movement through clear water.
subjects.relationship: Single main turtle subject moving among fish, coral, and gentle waves.
subjects.location: Midwater foreground above a colorful coral reef, with schools of fish in the background.
subjects.relative_size: Large compared with nearby fish and reef details, centered as the primary subject.
subjects.orientation: Swimming from left to right, occasionally angling upward toward the surface.
subjects.pose: Front flippers extended in a broad gliding stroke, shell level, head slightly raised.
subjects.action: Swims smoothly through the ocean and rises briefly toward the surface to breathe.
subjects.state_changes: Starts gliding over reef, moves through fish schools, ends angling upward with surface light brightening above.
subjects.clothing: None, natural shell and scales only.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Green scaled skin with patterned hard shell, natural mottled texture and wet reflective highlights.
subjects.facial_features: Small dark eyes, beaked mouth, patterned head scales.

background_setting: Turquoise ocean with a colorful coral reef below, schools of small fish, gentle wave patterns near the surface, and clear water extending into the distance.

lighting.conditions: Warm sunlight filters through the surface, casting caustic patterns across the turtle shell, coral, and fish.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm sunlight filters through the surface, casting caustic patterns across the turtle shell, coral, and fish.

aesthetics.composition: Graceful, bright, tropical, peaceful, biodiverse, richly colored reef environment.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Graceful, bright, tropical, peaceful, biodiverse, richly colored reef environment.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth underwater side tracking shot, medium wide framing, camera follows the turtle while reef and fish slide past in layered parallax.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Realistic text to video marine wildlife scene with natural swimming and underwater light physics.
artistic_style: Cinematic ocean documentary realism with saturated turquoise and coral colors.
context: A green sea turtle travels through a healthy tropical reef ecosystem and nears the surface for air.

actions.description: The turtle glides over the coral reef, front flippers sweeping slowly through clear water.
It passes through colorful fish as sunlight ripples across its shell and the reef below.
The turtle angles gently upward toward the surface, preparing to break through for a breath.

segments.key_changes: Schools of fish surround the turtle while coral textures pass below.
segments.camera: Smooth underwater side tracking shot, medium wide framing, camera follows the turtle while reef and fish slide past in layered parallax.

segments.description: Surface glow grows brighter above as the turtle lifts its head.
segments.key_changes: Surface glow grows brighter above as the turtle lifts its head.

temporal_caption: 0:00-0:02 a green sea turtle glides above coral. 0:02-0:05 it swims through fish in warm filtered light. 0:05-0:07 it rises toward the turquoise surface to breathe.
audio_description: Muffled underwater current, soft bubbles, distant reef crackle, faint movement of passing fish.
